parsed.content: Thank you for considering Grand Meridian Ballroom for this special celebration! June 12th is available, and our elegant ballroom would be perfect for 120 guests with plated service. Given this is peak wedding season, I'm pleased to offer our premium plated dinner package.

proposed_terms.notes: Peak season pricing applies. Price includes our renowned Italian-American cuisine with choice of entrees. I can hold this date for 14 days pending your decision.

parsed.content: Thank you for the comprehensive proposal! The package looks wonderful and fits within our budget at $23,600. We'd like to move forward with booking June 12, 2027, and are prepared to provide the 50% deposit to secure the date.

parsed.content: Wonderful! I'm delighted to confirm your wedding reception at Grand Meridian Ballroom for June 12, 2027. Your couple will have an absolutely magical evening in our stunning historic ballroom with our premium plated service and all the included amenities.

parsed.content: We are requesting catering services for a wedding reception on June 12, 2027, for 120 guests with plated service style. Please provide your pricing and package details for this event.

proposed_terms.notes: Plated service style preferred, flexible on any Saturday in June 2027 if needed

parsed.content: Thank you for considering Grand Meridian Ballroom Catering for your June wedding! For 120 guests with our elegant plated service, I'm quoting $18,630 total, which includes our signature Italian and Mediterranean-inspired menu with New England touches. Since June is peak wedding season, this reflects our premium seasonal pricing.

proposed_terms.notes: Peak season surcharge applied (15% for June). Bar packages available separately. Complimentary tasting available - waived upon booking. Can hold date for 14 days.

parsed.content: Thank you for the detailed proposal. The pricing is above our budget expectations at $18,630. We'd like to negotiate a better rate - could you offer any flexibility on pricing, perhaps $16,500 total, while maintaining the quality plated service our couple desires?

proposed_terms.notes: Requesting reduced pricing while maintaining plated service quality and included amenities

parsed.content: I understand budget is important, and I'd love to work with you on this beautiful June wedding. While I can't meet $16,500, I can offer $17,400 total ($145/head) and include a complimentary champagne toast since you're over 150 guests... well, almost! I can also waive our cake-cutting fee as part of this package to add extra value.

proposed_terms.notes: Special wedding package with value-adds. Tasting available. This is a competitive rate for peak June season while maintaining our signature quality.

parsed.content: We appreciate your flexibility and the added value with the champagne toast and waived cake-cutting fee. At $17,400 total, this works within our budget and provides excellent service for our couple's special day.

proposed_terms.notes: Accepting the proposal with plated service, champagne toast, and waived cake-cutting fee included

parsed.content: For your June wedding, I recommend our Classic package which beautifully serves 120 guests with comprehensive ceremony and reception florals. June is perfect for our signature peonies and garden roses, creating that romantic garden aesthetic we're known for.

proposed_terms.notes: Includes free consultation with digital mood board creation. June allows for premium peonies and garden roses. Sample arrangement available for $150 (credited toward final payment). Final design confirmation 6 weeks before event.

parsed.content: Your Classic package at $3,800 is perfect for our needs and fits well within our floral budget. We appreciate the comprehensive inclusion of ceremony and reception florals, and the seasonal peonies and garden roses sound ideal for the June date.
